# Decision records (ADRs)

One row per `NNNN-*.json` in this folder â€” the catalog of decisions that shaped the project. Number, title, and status come from each file's fields; supersession from its `supersedes` / `supersededBy` fields. Open a record (or the [dashboard](../dashboard/index.html), via `python3 ../dashboard/serve.py`) for the full **Context Â· Decision Â· Consequences Â· What stays true**.

| #    | Decision                  | Status   |
|------|---------------------------|----------|
| [0001](0001-initial-direction.json) | Initial project direction | Accepted |
| [0002](0002-binary-scope-orchestration-in-skill.json) | tian binary = control/monitor primitives; orchestration lives in the skill | Accepted |

| [0005](0005-app-global-git-monitor.json) | Replace per-Session git watching with an app-global, repo-keyed GitMonitor (split signals + visible/busy gating) | Proposed |

*Add a record only when direction changes â€” a choice a future session shouldn't silently reverse. When one supersedes another, set `supersedes` on the new record and `supersededBy` (+ `status: "Superseded"`) on the old. After any change, refresh this index (or just re-run `/project-kit`, which regenerates it).*
